contact.text: A large cargo freighter is traveling nearby. We could run a discreet scan of its hold. Or a thorough one. Thorough is... less discreet.

scan-success.text: Discreet scan complete. The hold contains {pick:fourteen tons of breakfast cereal|a full carousel, disassembled|mattresses. Just... mattresses|artisanal gravel}. They never knew we were there.

scan-partial.text: Partial result only. The hold contains either {pick:penguins or pillows|soup or circuitry|hats or hazardous materials}. The universe keeps its mysteries today.

scan-jackpot.text: Full manifest acquired! {pick:Forty thousand rubber ducks|A single, very large bell|Every sock that has ever gone missing}. Also their lunch orders. We know everything.

scan-caught.text: They detected the scan. The freighter has responded with an extremely rude light pattern and is now driving with theatrical slowness in front of us. We deserve this.

leave.text: Understood. The freighter passes unexamined, its secrets intact. Somewhere, a mystery is grateful.
